questions.name: C++ - OOP: Safe String (RAII)
questions.questiontext: Design a class SimpleString that dynamically allocates memory for a character array (char*) of the specified size in the constructor. Implement a destructor that ensures memory is properly released when the object is destroyed (preventing memory leaks).
questions.code:
{
    SimpleString s(100); // Allocates 100 bytes and automatically frees them when needed

questions.name: C++ - OOP: Dynamic Array (Vector) Implementation
questions.questiontext:
Design a simplified dynamic array class IntVector. The class should simulate the behavior of std::vector for integers. Implement:
1. A constructor that allocates initial memory.
2. A method push_back(int value) to add an element.
3. A method pop_back() to remove the last element.
4. A destructor that ensures safe memory deallocation.
